triples.subject: U.S. electric vehicle market
triples.evidence: grew from a few thousand vehicles in 2010 to more than 315,000 vehicles sold annually from 2018 to 2020

triples.subject: US EV market
triples.evidence: electric share of new vehicle sales was approximately 2.4% in 2020

triples.subject: States with ZEV regulations
triples.evidence: states with zero-emission vehicle regulations had a combined new electric vehicle share of 5%

triples.subject: States with ZEV regulations
triples.object: Two-thirds of 2020 U.S. electric vehicle sales
triples.evidence: were responsible for about two-thirds of 2020 U.S. electric vehicle sales

triples.subject: Top 11 metropolitan areas
triples.evidence: top 11 metropolitan areas with the highest uptake had consumer incentives ranging from $1,500 to more than $5,500

triples.subject: Top ten metropolitan areas
triples.evidence: top ten with the highest uptake averaged a 10% electric share

triples.subject: Top ten metropolitan areas
triples.evidence: the ten areas with the highest uptake averaged 935 public chargers per million population

triples.subject: Half of the U.S. population
triples.evidence: half of the U.S. population lives in an area with just 20% of the public charging availability

triples.subject: Top ten metropolitan areas
triples.evidence: the ten areas with the highest uptake averaged 430 workplace chargers per million population

triples.subject: Half of the U.S. population
triples.evidence: half of the U.S. population lives in an area with less than 10% of this leading benchmark
